calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-05-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Woo for REgina Chan (Petitioner).

Mr. Chan pleaded with the Court to approve his petition and provide peace of mind to his Client. The Court stated that it generally does not approve these petitions when the property is titled in community property with right of survivorship, and that because of the way it is titled, the property passes to the Spouse and she has the right of survivorship. The Petition for Spousal Property is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
